name: Weight Watchers Apple Cheddar Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 small Red apples, quartered thinly, sliced
6 oz Natural mild cheddar cheese, cut into small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the quartered apples in a small bowl and toss with lemon juice.
2. Add the celery and mix well.
3. Stir in the cubed cheddar cheese, low-calorie mayonnaise, salt, and pepper until evenly coated.
4. Serve on a plate lined with lettuce leaves.
